title: AD - Advancement Disabler
body:
# 🚫 Zeio's Advancement Disabler

## ✨ Overview

**Zeio's Advancement Disabler** is a lightweight **Minecraft 1.21.1 NeoForge mod** that completely removes the **advancement (achievement) system** from the game.

No advancement pop-ups, no progress tracking, and no advancement menu — just **clean Minecraft gameplay**. 🎮

---

## ⚙️ What the Mod Does

This mod disables the advancement system **at its core**, not just visually.

That means:

* ❌ No advancement data loading
* ❌ No progress tracking
* ❌ No advancement rewards
* ❌ No advancement UI

Advancements from **vanilla Minecraft and other mods** can be fully disabled.

---

## 🧩 Main Features

🗑 **Complete Advancement Removal**
All advancements are removed during server loading before they can be processed.

🛡 **Prevents Advancement Grants**
Any attempt to give or revoke an advancement is automatically blocked.

🖥 **Disabled Advancement Screen**
Opening the advancement menu shows a simple message indicating that advancements are disabled.

⚙️ **Configurable Options**
Choose what to disable:

* Vanilla advancements
* Modded advancements
* Advancement screen

---

## 🔗 Compatibility

The mod uses **namespace filtering**, making it compatible with **any mod that adds advancements** without needing manual configuration.

---

💡 Perfect for players who want a **clean, distraction-free Minecraft experience** without advancements.
